action_set_definitions.name: fetch_report_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full state of a specific expense report, including submitter ID, project ID, current status, and line items.

report_id.description: The unique identifier for the expense report (e.g., 'EXP-2024-V2').

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_project_sow_terms
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the governing SOW terms for a project, including allowable expense categories and the remaining Not-to-Exceed (NTE) balance.

project_id.description: The unique identifier for the project.

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_employee_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves administrative data for an employee, specifically their department's variance account for non-compliant cost re-routing.

employee_id.description: The unique identifier for the employee.

action_set_definitions.name: reallocate_line_item
action_set_definitions.description: Updates a specific line item's billing status and routes the cost to a specific account (e.g., a variance account).

report_id.description: The report ID containing the line item.

item_id.description: The ID of the specific line item to adjust.

is_billable.description: Whether the item is billable to the project project.

destination_account_id.description: The account ID where the cost should be routed (e.g., the variance account).

action_set_definitions.name: submit_final_audit
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the audit process and transitions the report status.

report_id.description: The ID of the report to finalize.

status.description: The final status to set for the report.

audit_note.description: A summary of the adjustments made.

state_description.report_id: Unique identifier for the expense report
state_description.status: Current status of the report (e.g., Pending, Under Review, Approved, Rejected)
state_description.submitter: The name or ID of the employee who submitted the report
state_description.total_amount: The total sum of all line items in the report
state_description.line_items: List of individual expenses within the report, including fields like id, amount, category, and audit_flag
state_description.audit_logs: A chronological record of actions taken on this report during the audit process
state_description.policy_violations: List of automatically detected policy issues (e.g., 'Over limit', 'Duplicate receipt')

line_items.description: International Flight to Project Site - Business Class
Project Kickoff Dinner - Includes $90.00 alcohol selection
